description: Build a modern web application with user authentication, a REST API, and a React frontend. Use FastAPI and PostgreSQL for the backend and React 18 with TypeScript for the frontend. Deploy using Docker on AWS ECS.

Develop a scalable REST API backend for a mobile application. Support user registration, push notifications, file uploads to S3, and real-time updates via WebSockets. Use FastAPI, Redis for caching, and PostgreSQL.

Build a data analytics platform that ingests CSV and JSON data, applies transformations, and provides dashboards. Use Python, Apache Airflow for orchestration, PostgreSQL for storage, and a React dashboard frontend.
